original: It’s hard to believe that you used the scales of a legendary creature to make a sling bikini, but here you are. A split strip of sleek, white dragon scale, held together with fur hide, that has just enough material to cover your crotch, [pc.nipples], and barely a few inches more.
context: <<POS:05827074>> e.tooltip='It’s hard to believe that you used the scales of a legendary'
